interests.title: Interests
interests.summary: Choose interests that match you to get better product and design suggestions across the shop and creator tools.
tips: Choose interests that match you to get better suggestions.
You can select up to 10 interests.
New interest? Type it and I will suggest matching terms.

community.title: Community
community.summary: Grow your network with referral links and earn commission across up to 10 levels.
tips: Share your referral link to grow your network.
Your network has 10 levels and each level earns commission.
Use promo codes to win new partners.

generate-design.title: Design Generator
generate-design.summary: Create AI designs from a text prompt or reference image, then save and publish them.
tips: The more detailed your prompt, the better the result.
You can upload your own image as a reference.
Try different styles for unique designs.
After generation, you can publish the design directly.

my-creations.title: My Creations
my-creations.summary: Browse, filter, and manage all designs you have generated or uploaded.
tips: Click a design to see more options.
You can filter designs by date or type.
Unsaved designs are deleted after 30 days.

publish.title: Publish Products
publish.summary: Place your design on print-on-demand products and publish them to the shop.
tips: Select a design first, then choose products.
You can publish to multiple products at once.
After publishing, you can find the product in the shop.

my-products.title: My Products
my-products.summary: View products you have published and manage their visibility in the shop.
tips: Published products appear in your creator storefront.
You can update mockups and metadata from here.

active-jobs.title: Active Jobs
active-jobs.summary: Track in-progress generation and publishing jobs.
tips: Jobs run in the background while you browse.
You will get a notification when a job completes.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.summary: Save products you like and find them again quickly.
tips: Tap the heart icon on a product to favorite it.
Favorites sync when you are logged in.

gift-cards.title: Gift Cards
gift-cards.summary: Purchase or redeem Eazpire gift cards.
tips: Gift cards can be shared with friends and family.
Redeem a code at checkout.

promo-codes.title: Promo Codes
promo-codes.summary: Create and share promo codes for your community.
tips: Promo codes can offer discounts or track referrals.
Share codes from your community dashboard.

size-ai.title: Size AI
size-ai.summary: Get size recommendations based on your measurements.
tips: Enter your measurements and I will suggest the best size.
Reference sizes help for more accurate recommendations.
The recommendation applies to all product types.

my-orders.title: My Orders
my-orders.summary: View order history, details, and tracking information.
tips: Click an order for details and tracking.
If there is an issue with an order, report it.
You can see your last 10 orders here.

product-search.title: Product Search
product-search.summary: Search the shop by keyword or browse categories.
tips: Enter a search term or choose a category.
You can add products directly to your cart.
Mark favorites with the heart icon for later.

browse-shop.title: Browse Shop
browse-shop.summary: Discover products, trends, and personalized recommendations.
tips: Discover new products and trends.
Recommendations are based on your interests.
You can search for something specific anytime.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.summary: Combine up to 9 items into outfits and generate AI outfit previews.
tips: Combine up to 9 items per outfit.
Generate an AI image of your outfit.
You can save up to 20 outfits.

my-mockups.title: My Mockups
my-mockups.summary: Upload photos and generate product mockups.
tips: Upload a photo and I will generate mockups for different products.
Choose the right person type for more realistic results.
Mockups work great as product previews.

hero-images.title: Hero Images
hero-images.summary: Create rotating hero banners for your shop storefront (costs EAZ).
tips: Hero Images cost 0.5 EAZ and appear as shop title images.
Choose up to 5 products for one hero image.
Published hero images rotate randomly on your shop page.

creator-image.title: Creator Image
creator-image.summary: Set your avatar and cover image shown on your creator profile.
tips: Your avatar is optimized to 512x512 and your cover to 800x300.
You can upload images or generate them with AI.
Your creator image appears on your profile and products.

creator-settings.title: Creator Settings
creator-settings.summary: Manage creator names, filters, and publishing defaults.
tips: You can create up to 5 creator names.
The active creator defines the name you publish under.
Filter settings decide which products you see.

balance.title: EAZ Balance
balance.summary: EAZ is your in-app currency for premium features like hero images.
tips: EAZ is your currency for premium features like hero images.
You earn EAZ by creating designs, sales, and daily login.
Your max balance increases with your level.

level.title: Creator Level
level.summary: Your level unlocks benefits and raises your maximum EAZ balance.
tips: Your level determines your maximum EAZ balance.
You gain XP through activities like creating designs and publishing products.
There are 10 levels and each unlocks new benefits.

mentor-support.title: Support a Creator
mentor-support.summary: Tip or support other creators in the community.
tips: Support creators you follow or collaborate with.
Tips may use EAZ or shop checkout depending on the flow.

chat-input.title: Chat Input
chat-input.summary: Type a message or use functions from the carousel above the input.
tips: Ask anything about the shop or creator tools.
Use the + button for a new conversation.
Type Support to reach a human.

chat-functions.title: Function Carousel
chat-functions.summary: Quick access to Eazy functions like design generation, orders, and settings.
tips: Tap a function icon to start a guided flow.
Customize visible functions in the Eazy tab with the eye icon.
